description: Enhanced search with autocomplete/suggestions, additional filters (genre, release year, explicit content), additional sort options (album name), voice search, recent searches persistence, and keyboard shortcuts.
steps: Update lib/types.ts to add explicit content fields (trackExplicitness, collectionExplicitness) to ItunesTrack and ItunesAlbum interfaces. Add a RecentSearch type.
Create lib/recent-searches.ts - localStorage utility to store/retrieve recent search queries (max 10), with add, get, clear functions.

Update app/components/SearchBar.tsx to: (a) Show a dropdown with autocomplete suggestions using debounced iTunes search API calls as the user types. (b) Show recent searches when the input is focused and empty. (c) Add a voice search button using the browser's SpeechRecognition API (with feature detection fallback). (d) Add keyboard shortcut '/' to focus search (with a visual hint). (e) Save successful searches to recent searches.

Update app/components/SearchFilters.tsx to add: Genre filter (dropdown with common music genres like Pop, Rock, Hip-Hop, Electronic, Jazz, Classical, Country, R&B, etc.), Release Year filter (dropdown or range selector for decade/year ranges), Explicit Content toggle (show/hide explicit tracks). Add 'Album Name' to sort options.
Update app/page.tsx to handle the new filter parameters: genre, year, explicit. Pass them to the search functions and filter results accordingly. Add albumName sort.
Update lib/itunes.ts to support genre filtering via the genreIndex parameter in the iTunes API, and to handle explicit content filtering on the results.

Create app/components/KeyboardShortcuts.tsx - a client component that registers global keyboard shortcuts: '/' to focus search, 'Escape' to close dropdowns, space to play/pause current track. Show a small '?' help modal listing shortcuts.
acceptance_criteria: Typing in search bar shows autocomplete dropdown with live suggestions after a short debounce
Recent searches appear when search input is focused and empty
Voice search button appears (on supported browsers) and transcribes speech to search query
Genre, Release Year, and Explicit Content filters are available and functional
Sort by Album Name option works correctly
Pressing '/' focuses the search bar from anywhere on the page
bun run build passes without errors
